2605.00421.title: RadLite: Multi-Task LoRA Fine-Tuning of Small Language Models for CPU-Deployable Radiology AI
2605.00421.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) show promise in radiology but their deployment is limited by computational requirements that preclude use in resource-constrained clinical environments. We investigate whether small language models (SLMs) of 3-4 billion parameters can achieve strong multi-task radiology performance through LoRA fine-tuning, enabling deployment on consumer-grade CPUs. We train Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct and Qwen3-4B on 162K samples spanning 9 radiology tasks - RADS classification across 10 systems, impression generation, temporal comparison, radiology NLI, NER, abnormality detection, N/M staging, and radiology Q&A - compiled from 12 public datasets. Both models are evaluated on up to 500 held-out test samples per task with standardized metrics. Our key findings are: (1) LoRA fine-tuning dramatically improves performance over zero-shot baselines (RADS accuracy +53%, NLI +60%, N-staging +89%); (2) the two models exhibit complementary strengths - Qwen2.5 excels at structured generation tasks while Qwen3 dominates extractive tasks; (3) a task-outed oracle ensemble combining both models achieves the best performance across all tasks; (4) few-shot prompting with fine-tuned models hurts performance, demonstrating that LoRA adaptation is more effective than in-context learning for specialized domains; and (5) models can be quantized to GGUF format (~1.8-2.4GB) for CPU deployment at 4-8 tokens/second on consumer hardware. Our work demonstrates that small, efficiently fine-tuned models - which we collectively call RadLite - can serve as practical multi-task radiology AI assistants deployable entirely on consumer hardware without GPU requirements.
2605.00421.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）在放射學中顯示出潛力，但其部署受到計算需求的限制，無法在資源有限的臨床環境中使用。<lb/>我們研究了是否可以通過LoRA微調，讓具有30-40億參數的小型語言模型（SLMs）實現強大的多任務放射學表現，從而能在消費級CPU上部署。<lb/>我們在涵蓋9個放射學任務的162K樣本上訓練了Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct和Qwen3-4B——這些任務包括10個系統的RADS分類、印象生成、時間比較、放射學NLI、NER、異常檢測、N/M分期和放射學問答——這些樣本來自12個公共數據集。<lb/>這兩個模型在每個任務上最多評估500個保留測試樣本，並使用標準化指標進行評估。<lb/>我們的主要發現是：（1）LoRA微調顯著提高了性能，相較於零-shot基準（RADS準確率提高53%，NLI提高60%，N分期提高89%）；（2）這兩個模型展現出互補的優勢——Qwen2.5在結構生成任務中表現優異，而Qwen3在提取任務中佔據主導地位；（3）結合兩個模型的任務導向oracle集成在所有任務中達到了最佳性能；（4）使用微調模型的少量提示會降低性能，顯示出LoRA適應在專業領域中比上下文學習更有效；（5）這些模型可以量化為GGUF格式（約1.8-2.4GB），在消費硬體上以每秒4-8個標記的速度進行CPU部署。<lb/>我們的研究表明，小型且高效微調的模型——我們統稱為RadLite——可以作為實用的多任務放射學AI助手，完全在不需要GPU的消費硬體上部署。
2605.00421.author: Pankaj Gupta et.al.
